creator: camel@avias.com
text:
there is a bug (or typo :) in src/UPDATING file of -CURRENT branch.

19991218:
    sendmail.cf has moved from /etc/sendmail.cf to
    /etc/mail/sendmail.cf.  You may need to adjust /etc/rc.conf to
    cope as well as moving sendmail.cf.

actually it should be /etc/rc instead of /etc/rc.conf
